message:
test: pin mkfifo+mknod conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_mkfifo_mknod.rs covering 4 functions:
- mkfifo: S_IFIFO mode verified via stat(), EEXIST when target is a
  regular file
- mkfifoat: AT_FDCWD relative path
- mknod: S_IFREG (regular) and S_IFIFO (fifo via mknod) modes
- mknodat: AT_FDCWD with S_IFREG

Char/block device creation excluded (requires CAP_MKNOD).

7 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-mkf1
